mapper.select:
/* 주문 건 조회 (양산계획 시 포함) */ select '100' as gubun, '100' as sordgbn, '주문' as sordgbnnm, convert(varchar(8), a.ordymd, 112) as ordymd, a.ordno, b.orowno, a.custcd, c.custnm as custnm, b.itemcd, f.itemnm, f.itsize, b.ordqty, b.ordqty as planqty, b.ordamt as suppamt, convert(varchar(8), a.outymd, 112) as napgiymd, convert(varchar(8), a.outymd, 112) as dlvhopedt, a.updemp from HSIO030T_TBL a join hsio031t_tbl b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.ordymd = b.ordymd and a.ordno = b.ordno left join haba020t_tbl c on a.cmpycd = c.cmpycd and a.custcd = c.custcd left join hsba010t_tbl f on b.cmpycd = f.cmpycd and b.itemcd = f.itemcd left join hppl160t_tbl g on b.cmpycd = g.cmpycd and b.ordno = g.ordno and b.orowno = g.orowno where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.outymd between #{frymd} and #{toymd} and a.sts = 'y' and f.astkind = '200' and isnull(b.ordqty, 0) - isnull(g.planqty, 0) > 0 UNION ALL
/* 양산/기타/외주 요청 건 조회 */ select a.gubun as gubun, a.gubun as sordgbn, case a.gubun when '200' then '양산' when '300' then '외주' else '기타' end as sordgbnnm, a.reqymd as ordymd, '000000' as ordno, a.reqno as orowno, a.custcd, cust.custnm as custnm, a.itemcd, c.itemnm, c.itsize, a.planqty as ordqty, isnull(a.planqty, 0) - isnull(b.planqty, 0) as planqty, 0 as suppamt, a.napgiymd, a.napgiymd as dlvhopedt, a.updemp from hppl150t_tbl a left join hppl160t_tbl b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and b.ordno = '000000' and a.reqno = b.orowno left join hsba010t_tbl c on a.cmpycd = c.cmpycd and a.itemcd = c.itemcd left join haba020t_tbl cust on a.cmpycd = cust.cmpycd and a.custcd = cust.custcd where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.reqymd between #{frymd} and #{toymd} and a.gubun = #{gubun} and isnull(a.planqty, 0) - isnull(b.planqty, 0) > 0

select a.yymmdd, a.ser, case datepart(dw, convert(date, a.yymmdd)) when 1 then '일' when 2 then '월' when 3 then '화' when 4 then '수' when 5 then '목' when 6 then '금' when 7 then '토' end as day_nm, a.itemcd, b.itemnm, b.itsize, a.custcd, c.custnm as custnm, a.linecd, d.linenm, a.progcd, e.prognm, a.planqty, a.ordqty, a.napgiymd, a.napgiymd as dlvhopedt, a.ordymd, a.ordno, a.orowno, isnull(f.gadrate, 0) as gadrate, isnull(f.jungrate, 0) as jungrate, /* 🚀 capahh와 stdworkhh 중 있는 값을 우선 사용 */ case when isnull(f.capahh, 0) > 0 then f.capahh else isnull(f.stdworkhh, 0) end * 60 as capahh, isnull(f.gadtmdd, 0) as gadtmdd, isnull(f.pqtytt, 0) as pqtytt, isnull(f.pqtydd, 0) as unit_capa from hppl160t_tbl a left join hsba010t_tbl b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.itemcd = b.itemcd left join haba020t_tbl c on a.cmpycd = c.cmpycd and a.custcd = c.custcd left join hpba130t_tbl d on a.cmpycd = d.cmpycd and a.linecd = d.linecd left join hpba100t_tbl e on a.cmpycd = e.cmpycd and a.linecd = e.linecd and a.progcd = e.progcd left join hpba200t_tbl f on a.cmpycd = f.cmpycd and a.itemcd = f.itemcd and a.linecd = f.linecd and a.progcd = f.progcd where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.napgiymd between #{frymd} and #{toymd} order by a.napgiymd, a.yymmdd, a.linecd, a.progcd, a.ser
select isnull(ordqty, 0) from hppl160t_tbl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and yymmdd = #{yymmdd} and ser = #{ser}
mapper.delete: delete from hppl160t_tbl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and yymmdd = #{yymmdd} and ser = #{ser}
mapper.select: with date_range as ( select convert(varchar(8), dateadd(day, number, convert(date, #{frymd})), 112) as yymmdd from master..spt_values where type = 'p' and number <= datediff(day, convert(date, #{frymd}), convert(date, #{toymd})) ), plan_sum as ( select yymmdd, sum(planqty) as total_plan from hppl160t_tbl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and linecd = #{linecd} and yymmdd between #{frymd} and #{toymd} group by yymmdd ), capa_sum as ( -- 현재 계획된 품목들의 표준 Capa(pqtydd) 합계 select a.yymmdd, sum(isnull(b.pqtydd, 0)) as total_capa from hppl160t_tbl a join hpba200t_tbl b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.itemcd = b.itemcd and a.linecd = b.linecd and a.progcd = b.progcd where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.linecd = #{linecd} and a.yymmdd between #{frymd} and #{toymd} group by a.yymmdd ) select d.yymmdd, isnull(p.total_plan, 0) as plan_qty, isnull(c.total_capa, 0) as capa_qty, case when isnull(c.total_capa, 0) = 0 then 0 else round((isnull(p.total_plan, 0) / isnull(c.total_capa, 0)) * 100, 1) end as rate from date_range d left join plan_sum p on d.yymmdd = p.yymmdd left join capa_sum c on d.yymmdd = c.yymmdd order by d.yymmdd
